findings_addressed.description: Jest trying to run Playwright E2E tests, and config file throwing 'no test found'.
findings_addressed.resolution: Fixed jest.config.js to exclude e2e tests folder, and added valid assertions to config.test.ts.

findings_addressed.description: Missing ARIA properties in Select component.
findings_addressed.resolution: Added aria-controls dynamically using React.useId() to combobox and content. Passed a11y.
